vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.placeholder: Vehicle fleet management will appear here.

trips.title: Trips
trips.needResources: Assign a vehicle and driver to see dispatch eligibility.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.subtitle: Performance metrics, costs, emissions, and fleet health.

metrics.totalVehicles: Total number of vehicles registered in your fleet. Only active (non-deleted) vehicles are counted.
metrics.available: Vehicles currently available for dispatch. Excludes vehicles on trip, in maintenance, or retired.
metrics.inMaintenance: Vehicles currently undergoing maintenance or service. Based on active maintenance logs.
metrics.onTrip: Vehicles currently assigned to an active trip (dispatched or in-transit status).
metrics.activeTrips: Trips currently in dispatched or in-transit status. These are actively being executed.
metrics.pendingTrips: Trips in draft status awaiting dispatch. These have been created but not yet assigned.
metrics.driversOnDuty: Drivers currently available or on-trip. Excludes off-duty and suspended drivers.
metrics.completed30d: Number of trips completed in the last 30 days. Based on completed_at timestamps.
metrics.fuelCost: Total fuel expenditure over the last 30 days across all fuel logs.
metrics.maintenanceCost: Total maintenance expenditure over the last 30 days from maintenance logs.
metrics.expenses: Total expenses (tolls, parking, repairs, etc.) over the last 30 days.
metrics.totalOpCost: Sum of fuel cost, maintenance cost, and expenses over the last 30 days.
metrics.fuelEff: Fuel efficiency percentile score (0-100). Higher means better km/L relative to fleet average. Based on trip fuel records.
metrics.maint: Maintenance health score (0-100). Higher means fewer open maintenance items and longer mean time between repairs.
metrics.driverSafety: Driver safety score (0-100) aggregated across all drivers who operated this vehicle. Based on safety events per 1000 km.
metrics.utilization: Utilization score (0-100). Higher means the vehicle is used more days out of the period. Based on days with at least one trip.
metrics.overall: Weighted composite of all four component scores. Used for health ranking and maintenance prioritization.
metrics.totalCo2: Total CO2 emissions (kg) over the selected period. Computed using IPCC 2006 emission factors.
metrics.totalDistance: Total distance traveled (km) across all trips in the selected period.
metrics.co2Intensity: Grams of CO2 emitted per kilometer. A lower value indicates better fuel efficiency and lower environmental impact.
metrics.reportingMethod: Emission calculation methodology. IPCC/GHG uses standard emission factors per fuel type.
metrics.avgUtilization: Mean utilization percentage across all vehicles. Higher values indicate better fleet utilization.
metrics.vehiclesTracked: Number of vehicles with trip activity in the selected period.
metrics.busiestVehicle: Vehicle with the highest utilization percentage in the period.
metrics.co2Kg: Total CO2 emitted by this vehicle (kg). Sum of all emissions records for the period.
metrics.distanceKm: Total distance traveled by this vehicle (km). Sum of actual distances from completed trips.
metrics.trips: Number of trips completed by this vehicle in the selected period.
metrics.co2PerKm: CO2 intensity per kilometer for this vehicle. Lower is better.

copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.noData: No copilot data available for this vehicle. Complete a trip or record maintenance to generate insights.

offline.conflictDesc: These mutations were rejected by the server and require your attention.

search.typeMore: Type at least 3 characters to search

emptyStates.noVehiclesDesc: Add your first vehicle to start tracking your fleet.
emptyStates.noDriversDesc: Add your first driver to start managing your workforce.
emptyStates.noTripsDesc: Create your first trip to get started with fleet operations.
emptyStates.noNotificationsDesc: You're all caught up! Notifications will appear here when events occur.
emptyStates.noAuditLogsDesc: Audit logs are automatically recorded when actions are performed. Check back after using the system.
emptyStates.noMaintenanceDesc: Record your first maintenance event to start tracking vehicle health.
emptyStates.noReportDataDesc: Data will appear here once records are generated. Try completing some trips or recording maintenance.
emptyStates.noSearchResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or browsing from the navigation.

healthData.noData: No vehicle health data. Health scores are computed after trip completion, maintenance closure, or fuel anomaly events.

emissionsData.noData: No emissions data. Emissions are recorded when trips with fuel consumption data complete.
emissionsData.footnote: Emission factors: Diesel 2.68 kg/L, Petrol 2.31 kg/L, CNG 1.93 kg/L (IPCC 2006). Values where fuel records are absent use estimated consumption.

utilizationData.noData: No utilization data. Complete some trips to see utilization metrics.

push.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.offline: You are offline. Changes will be synced when you reconnect.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
